nasb.text: “You shall speak all these words to them, but they will not listen to you; and you shall call to them, but they will not answer you.

esv.text: “So you shall speak all these words to them, but they will not listen to you. You shall call to them, but they will not answer you.

cnv.text: “你要把這一切話告訴他們，他們卻不聽從你；你呼叫他們，他們也不回應。

ccb.text: 耶利米啊，你将这番话告诉他们，他们也不会听；你向他们呼吁，他们也不会回应。
